parameters.query:
SELECT
  i.insights,
  i.adjustments,
  i.summary,
  i.win_rate,
  i.trades_analyzed,
  i.created_at as last_review_date,
  (CURRENT_DATE - i.created_at::date > 7) as review_overdue,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trades WHERE created_at > COALESCE(i.created_at, '2000-01-01')) as trades_since_review
FROM insights i
ORDER BY i.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1
